pi_items.source: Task description line 2 explicitly states: 'Create a new survey titled "New Hire IT Provisioning 2025".'

Task description line 4 explicitly states: 'Create a List (Radio) question with code "DEPT"... with these exact answer options (Code / Text): "SALES" / "Sales", "ENG" / "Engineering", "LEGAL" / "Legal".'
Task description line 6 explicitly states: 'Code "SF" (Salesforce CRM): Show only if Department is SALES.'
Task description line 6 explicitly states: 'Code "VS" (Visual Studio): Show only if Department is Engineering (ENG).'
Task description line 6 explicitly states: 'Code "LN" (LexisNexis): Show only if Department is Legal (LEGAL).'
Task description line 6 explicitly states: 'Code "SL" (Slack): Show if Department is Sales OR Engineering.'
Task description line 6 explicitly states: 'Code "OFF" (Microsoft Office): Always visible.'

Confirmed via Docker Hub search: martialblog/limesurvey is a real, publicly maintained Docker image repository (https://hub.docker.com/r/martialblog/limesurvey/). The 6-apache tag represents LimeSurvey version 6 with Apache and PHP 8.3.
Task description line 1 states: 'Login to LimeSurvey (admin / Admin123!).' Confirmed in setup_limesurvey.sh line 32: ADMIN_USER=admin
Task description line 1 provides credentials '(admin / Admin123!)'. Confirmed in setup_limesurvey.sh line 33: ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin123!
Confirmed in setup_limesurvey.sh line 30: MYSQL_USER=limesurvey, and line 57: DB_USERNAME=limesurvey
Confirmed in setup_limesurvey.sh lines 31, 58: MYSQL_PASSWORD=limesurvey_pass and DB_PASSWORD=limesurvey_pass
Task description line 3 explicitly states: 'Add a question group "Role and Software".'
Task description line 4 explicitly states: 'Create a List (Radio) question with code "DEPT"'
Task description line 5 explicitly states: 'Create a Multiple Choice (Checkboxes) question with code "TOOLS"'

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a LimeSurvey form with dynamic subquestion visibility using Expression Manager. The survey title is 'New Hire IT Provisioning 2025', containing a DEPT question with codes SALES, ENG, LEGAL, and a TOOLS question with 5 subquestions (SF, VS, LN, SL, OFF) configured with relevance logic. SF shows only for SALES, VS only for ENG, LN only for LEGAL, SL for SALES OR ENG, and OFF always visible. The environment uses martialblog/limesurvey:6-apache Docker image with MySQL 8.0 backend, admin credentials admin/Admin123!, and database credentials limesurvey/limesurvey_pass.
